title: watsonx Day: Challenge
description: We are excited to share this opportunity from our friends at IBM TechXchange. Join **[watsonx Day: Challenge](https://watsonxday-challenge.bemyapp.com/?utm_medium=Developer-Meetup&utm_source=Event&utm_content=TXCWW&utm_id=Developer-Meetup)** and: * Create apps to learn generative AI skills * Compete solo or collaborate with like-minded innovators * Win prizes and be featured on IBM social [Visit the challenge website](https://watsonxday-challenge.bemyapp.com/?utm_medium=Developer-Meetup&utm_source=Event&utm_content=TXCWW&utm_id=Developer-Meetup) to find more information and register for the challenge. Once registered, you’ll receive a confirmation email. Prior to the challenge start date, you’ll receive additional information via email regarding access to education, our participant Slack channel and a prep webinar which will get you prepared for the challenge. **Challenge tracks:** * Use prompt engineering to analyze customer experience and take corresponding actions * Build a generative AI powered virtual assistant * Automate repetitive manual tasks to improve productivity\* **Key event information** * Top teams can win prizes including Apple AirPods Pro®, watsonx hoodies, and watsonx t-shirts! * Benefits to all participants: * Experience with innovation and real-world problem solving using generative AI * Free watsonx education and digital badging opportunities will be available prior to the challenge * During the challenge team up with peers on new ideas to innovate with watsonx For details and to RSVP, [please check the watsonx Day: Challenge website.](https://watsonxday-challenge.bemyapp.com/?utm_medium=Developer-Meetup&utm_source=Event&utm_content=TXCWW&utm_id=Developer-Meetup) \# \# \# **About the IBM Meetup Network** The IBM Meetup Network is relaunching! Here’s how you can get involved: * To browse content from across our network and suggest topics, speakers, etc., [join our community and content hub over on TechXchange](https://community.ibm.com/community/user/communities/community-home?CommunityKey=ba1b857a-1c90-456f-95d0-018e3e65d91d) * To explore volunteering opportunities with your local organizing team, [join our community Slack](https://join.slack.com/t/ibm-meetup-network/shared_invite/zt-2f5cn1rms-JNFI~A3_Jk5t0yMnPrwWhw) (link valid through 4/16) * In case you missed our recent community office hours, [please check out the notes we took in our shared doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1JSkdciQzKNFGE2hOIy-BmPvUnZ_KjPzMLO9qiyeVLoQ/edit#heading=h.faz9pdyuy7kn).
